subject: Orbeetle, a Galar-region Stage 2 Bug/Psychic-type Pokémon resembling a large beetle with an oversized glowing orb on its back
description: The art shows a large beetle-like creature with a prominent rounded red shell dotted with black markings, and a glowing amber orb mounted on its back. The creature has multiple thin dark legs and two small claw-like forearms visible at the bottom. It is posed in a slightly crouched, forward-facing stance in a forest or cave environment with blue-purple atmospheric lighting filtering through from behind. The background features dark organic shapes suggestive of trees or rock formations and a hazy violet-blue glow that creates a sense of psychic energy or bioluminescence. The reverse holofoil treatment adds sparkle across the card surface.
foreground: large beetle creature with red spotted shell and glowing amber orb on back, thin multiple legs
background: dark forest or cave with blue-purple atmospheric glow
